tools.name: kie_upload_file
tools.notes: Uploads a local file to KIE temporary storage.

tools.name: kie_generate_image
tools.notes: Submits an async image job. Reference images can be local paths or remote URLs.

tools.name: kie_generate_video
tools.notes: Submits an async video job. Seedance supports seedance-2-fast, seedance-2, and seedance-1.5-pro variants.

tools.name: kie_chat_completion
tools.notes: Runs a synchronous chat completion, optionally with image URLs or local image files.

tools.name: kie_suno_music
tools.notes: Submits an async Suno music generation job.

tools.name: kie_suno_lyrics
tools.notes: Submits an async Suno lyrics generation job.

tools.name: kie_suno_sounds
tools.notes: Submits an async Suno sounds generation job.

tools.name: kie_get_job_status
tools.notes: Reads a single async job status by model-routed endpoint.

tools.name: kie_wait_for_job
tools.notes: Polls until terminal state or timeout.
